atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness and tingling in his fingers and wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain is most noticeable at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain sometimes wakes him up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his hands sometimes feel asleep.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he drops things occasionally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physical exam reveals weakness in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physical exam reveals a positive Tinel's sign on the left wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and exam findings are consistent with carpal tunnel syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A differential diagnosis includes cervical radiculopathy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a wrist splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg every six hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician would like to see you back in two weeks to follow up on your progress.
